hero.eyebrow: Land degradation maps and geospatial data in Africa
hero.title: Geoportal
hero.description: Explore interactive maps and geospatial datasets on land degradation in Africa. Access spatial indicators, statistics, and tools to analyse environmental trends and support decision-making.
hero.tagline: Explore maps. Visualize data. Discover insights.

about.paragraph1: The Geoportal provides access to geospatial data on land and environment in Africa, enabling users to visualize, analyse, and download spatial datasets across the continent.
about.paragraph2: By integrating EO-based environmental indicators and national datasets, the Geoportal offers resources aligned with the UNCCD's four Strategic Objectives (SOs), supporting a comprehensive understanding of land degradation dynamics.
about.paragraph3: It supports evidence-based analysis and decision-making for sustainable land management at both continental and country levels.

keyFeatures.heading: Geoportal's Key features and capabilities
keyFeatures.feature1: Land use and land cover, highlighting ecosystems and land dynamics.
keyFeatures.feature2: Interactive land degradation maps, highlighting SDG indicator 15.3.1.
keyFeatures.feature3: Environmental indicators, covering the UNCCD strategic objectives.
keyFeatures.feature4: Vegetation, land, and climate monitoring layers.
keyFeatures.feature5: Downloadable geospatial datasets across countries and regions in formats compatible with GIS tools.
